prompt: 128-BPM darkwave night-drive: steady kick, gated snare, moody analog bass, a hooky lead in the second half.

cards.critique: This track is an exceptional candidate for rhythm-game charting, delivering a highly stable 128 BPM tempo and an immediate start on the very first beat with zero intro lag. The transient clarity is superb; the kick and gated snare are sharp, distinct, and sit proudly at the forefront of the mix without being obscured by the bassline or pads. Structurally, the progression is spot-on for a short snippet, building from a driving analog bassline into a very clear, hooky synth lead in the second half that provides the perfect melodic payoff. It completely nails the darkwave night-drive aesthetic and is ready for charting.
